meta_title: For Students: Git with AI to Solve no marketing skills (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Git with AI and overcome no marketing skills. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Git with AI to Solve no marketing skills
content.seo_description: Learn how to use Git with AI to overcome no marketing skills. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code to build your portfolio.
content.answer_block: You don't need a marketing degree to launch; you need a transparent build process. By using Git as your public journal and AI agents to document your code’s value proposition, you transform technical commits into compelling marketing content, proving your expertise to future employers without writing a single sales pitch.
content.intro:
The blank page of a portfolio is terrifying, especially when you feel like you have zero marketing talent. You’ve spent weeks grinding through logic and syntax, but the thought of 'selling' your project feels like a mountain you aren't equipped to climb. The industry doesn't care about your sales pitch; it cares about your ability to solve engineering problems.

Here is the shift: stop trying to be a marketer and start being a documentarian. By integrating AI into your Git workflow, you turn every commit into a narrative. This checklist leverages Antigravity and Claude Code to automate the translation of your technical progress into high-impact documentation that speaks for itself.

steps.title: Automate Contextual Commit Messages
steps.description: Stop using generic 'fixed bug' messages. Use AI to generate commit logs that explain the 'why' behind the code, turning your repo into a readable story.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current staged changes and write a commit message that explains the business value of this change for a potential recruiter.

steps.title: Generate Documentation from Code
steps.description: Your code should explain itself. Use AI to extract logic into a README that highlights the technical hurdles you overcame.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scan the current project directory and draft a README section that describes the technical architecture and the specific problem this feature solves.

steps.title: Create 'Build-in-Public' Social Snippets
steps.description: Turn your Git activity into social media content. Extract the most interesting technical snippets to share your progress.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Summarize the last three commits into a LinkedIn-style post that highlights the technical complexity without sounding like a salesperson.

steps.title: Refactor for Readability and Impact
steps.description: AI-assisted refactoring isn't just for efficiency; it's for clarity. Make your code a showcase of clean engineering practices.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor this module to follow clean code principles and add comments that explain the design pattern used to a junior developer.

steps.title: Verify Portfolio Readiness
steps.description: Use an AI audit to ensure your repo is ready for public consumption and professional scrutiny.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a 'portfolio audit' on this repository. Identify any missing documentation or unclear logic that would confuse a hiring manager.

pro_tips: Use Git tags to create 'milestone releases' that act as chapters in your project's history.
Never commit API keys; use AI to verify your .gitignore file against your current project structure.
Treat your pull requests as technical blog posts—explain the trade-offs you considered.
Use Claude Code to create a 'demo script' that guides users through your app's core functionality.
Automate your README updates on every push using a GitHub Action linked to an AI agent.
resources: Git Best Practices for Students: https://git-scm.com/book/en/v2
content.next_steps: Once your repo is documented, pin your best project to your GitHub profile and start contributing to one open-source library to build your community authority.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools to turn your code into a career-defining asset. Stop hiding behind your lack of marketing skills and start showcasing the engineering brilliance you've already built. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
